prompt: Create a cinematic wide banner illustration of a dramatic 18th-century mythological mini-opera performance: a powerful soprano stands center foreground in a storm-tossed ocean, singing with her mouth open and arms extended in a theatrical aria pose. She is an adult Mediterranean woman with windblown dark curly hair, expressive face, dangling earrings, and a flowing one-shoulder deep navy-blue Greco-Roman gown threaded with fine gold constellation-like lines. At the far left, show exactly two transverse flutes entering from off-canvas, each held by visible hands, angled diagonally toward the singer; the flutes emit luminous pale-blue ribbon streams of music that wrap around the singer and merge with the wind and waves. The background is an epic tempest: towering dark waves, sea spray, lightning-lit clouds, rocky cliffs, and a small ancient Greek temple on a crag at the right. In the upper right clouds, include a huge marble-like face of an angry Greek god with a laurel crown, partly formed from storm clouds and sea mist, watching over the scene. In the upper left, include a glowing antique gold circular disk containing a classical statue silhouette, surrounded by thin orbital arcs, tiny gold squares, and abstract musical/algorithmic graphics. Add subtle digital audio visualization elements: exactly two waveform/equalizer clusters, one blue vertical-bar cluster near the upper left edge and one red-yellow vertical-bar cluster along the lower right edge. Style should be hyper-detailed dark fantasy baroque album-cover art, dramatic chiaroscuro, teal-and-gold color grading, high contrast, dynamic motion, swirling fabric, water, lightning, and music trails. Wide 16:9 composition, no readable text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic wide banner illustration of a dramatic 18th-century mythological mini-opera performance: a powerful soprano stands center foreground in a storm-tossed ocean, singing with her mouth open and arms extended in a theatrical aria pose. She is an adult Mediterranean woman with windblown dark curly hair, expressive face, dangling earrings, and a flowing one-shoulder deep navy-blue Greco-Roman gown threaded with fine gold constellation-like lines. At the far left, show exactly two transverse flutes entering from off-canvas, each held by visible hands, angled diagonally toward the singer; the flutes emit luminous pale-blue ribbon streams of music that wrap around the singer and merge with the wind and waves. The background is an epic tempest: towering dark waves, sea spray, lightning-lit clouds, rocky cliffs, and a small ancient Greek temple on a crag at the right. In the upper right clouds, include a huge marble-like face of an angry Greek god with a laurel crown, partly formed from storm clouds and sea mist, watching over the scene. In the upper left, include a glowing antique gold circular disk containing a classical statue silhouette, surrounded by thin orbital arcs, tiny gold squares, and abstract musical/algorithmic graphics. Add subtle digital audio visualization elements: exactly two waveform/equalizer clusters, one blue vertical-bar cluster near the upper left edge and one red-yellow vertical-bar cluster along the lower right edge. Style should be hyper-detailed dark fantasy baroque album-cover art, dramatic chiaroscuro, teal-and-gold color grading, high contrast, dynamic motion, swirling fabric, water, lightning, and music trails. Wide 16:9 composition, no readable text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张电影感宽幅横幅插画，描绘一场戏剧性的 18 世纪神话迷你歌剧表演：一位强大的女高音站在前景中央，身处波涛汹涌的海洋中，张开嘴巴，双臂伸展，摆出戏剧性的咏叹调姿势。她是一位成年地中海女性，留着被风吹乱的深色卷发，表情生动，戴着吊坠耳环，身穿一件飘逸的深海军蓝单肩希腊罗马式长裙，裙上交织着精致的金色星座线条。在最左侧，展示恰好两支从画面外伸入的横笛，每支长笛由可见的手握住，斜向指向歌手；长笛散发出淡蓝色的发光音乐丝带，环绕着歌手并与风浪融为一体。背景是一场史诗般的暴风雨：高耸的暗色海浪、海浪飞沫、闪电照亮的云层、岩石峭壁，以及右侧悬崖上的一座小型古希腊神庙。在右上方的云层中，加入一张巨大的、类似大理石的愤怒希腊神祇面孔，戴着桂冠，部分由风暴云和海雾构成，俯瞰着整个场景。在左上方，加入一个发光的古董金圆形圆盘，其中包含一个古典雕像剪影，周围环绕着细长的轨道弧线、微小的金色方块以及抽象的音乐/算法图形。添加微妙的数字音频可视化元素：恰好两组波形/均衡器簇，一组蓝色垂直条形簇靠近左上边缘，另一组红黄色垂直条形簇沿右下边缘排列。风格应为超细节的暗黑奇幻巴洛克专辑封面艺术，具有戏剧性的明暗对比、青金配色、高对比度、动态感、飘逸的织物、水流、闪电和音乐轨迹。16:9 宽幅构图，无可见文字，无水印。
